src_raw: Since July 2018, the HKMA has launched various social media channels to strengthen public education and communication. Five social media channels are currently in operation: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter and YouTube, reaching out to a total of over 45,000 followers as at end-December 2019. Amid the social incidents in the second half of 2019, the HKMA made use of social media to rebut unfounded rumours regarding banking operations and financial stability, a move which proved to be highly effective in disseminating facts and preventing the rumours from spreading further.
mt_raw: 自2018年7月起，金管局推出多個社交媒體頻道，以強化公眾教育及溝通。目前有五個社交媒體頻道正在運作：Facebook、Instagram、LinkedIn、Twitter及YouTube，截至2019年12月底，共吸引超過45,000名追蹤者。在2019年下半年的社會事件中，金管局利用社交媒體駁斥有關銀行業務及金融穩定的不實謠言，這舉措在傳播事實及防止謠言進一步散播方面非常有效。

src_raw: The Public Enquiry Service provides an effective means for the public to better understand the key functions and operations of the HKMA. A total of 9,742 enquiries were handled in 2019, about half of which were related to banking policies and regulations, consumer banking, and notes and coins. Some of the notable enquiries raised were about the Coin Collection programme, banking products and services, banking-related guidelines and circulars, the Faster Payment System (FPS), and monetary and economic statistics.
mt_raw: 公眾查詢服務為大眾提供一個有效途徑，以更好地了解金管局的關鍵職能及運作。2019年共處理了9,742宗查詢，其中約一半與銀行政策及規例、個人銀行服務，以及紙幣及硬幣有關。部分值得注意的查詢包括硬幣收藏計畫、銀行產品及服務、與銀行相關的指引及通告、快速支付系統（FPS），以及貨幣及經濟統計數據。

terms: {'hkma': '金管局', 'half - yearly monetary and financial stability report': '貨幣與金融穩定情況半年度報告', 'monthly statistical bulletin': '金融數據月報', 'quarterly bulletin': '季報', 'insight article': '匯思文章'}
src_raw: Apart from the HKMA Annual Report, in 2019 the HKMA published two issues of the Half-Yearly Monetary and Financial Stability Report, four issues of the Quarterly Bulletin, and regular updates of the Monthly Statistical Bulletin to provide up-to-date and thematic information and analyses on monetary, banking and economic issues in Hong Kong. In addition, the HKMA published 19 inSight articles, covering various topics related to its work. The inSight articles provide a useful channel for the HKMA to elucidate the rationale behind its major new initiatives or policies, and provide timely response to topical issues which are of interest to the public.
mt_raw: 除了《金管局年報》外，金管局在2019年還出版了兩期《半年度貨幣及金融穩定報告》、四期《季度簡報》，以及定期更新《每月統計公報》，以提供有關香港貨幣、銀行及經濟議題的最新及專題資訊和分析。此外，金管局還出版了19篇《inSight》文章，涵蓋與其工作相關的各種主題。這些《inSight》文章為金管局提供了一個有用的管道，以闡明其主要新舉措或政策的理據，並及時回應大眾關注的熱門議題。

terms: {'banking ordinance': '銀行業條例', 'hkma': '金管局', 'smart consumer': '智醒消費者', 'authorize institution': '認可機構', 'local representative office': '本地代表辦事處', 'payment system and stored value facility ordinance': '《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）', 'revamp': '翻新', 'security staff of ais': '認可機構證券業務員工', 'ais': '認可機構', 'stored value facility': '儲值支付工具（包括電子錢包及預付卡）', 'store value facility': '儲值支付工具', 'svf': '儲值支付工具'}
src_raw: The HKMA official website (www.hkma.gov.hk) presents more than 40,000 pages of content in English and traditional and simplified Chinese, and is the public access gateway to up-to-date information about the HKMA. It also contains the register of authorized institutions (AIs) and local representative offices and the register of the securities staff of AIs, both maintained under section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as the register of stored value facility (SVF) licensees under the payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance. The HKMA official website underwent a major revamp and was relaunched in September with a new design layout, enriched content, an enhanced navigation structure, and more convenient search functions. The revamped website enables users to search information more easily and conveniently based on their own preferences. In particular, the revamped website carries a new section on “Smart Consumers”, where the public can find useful information and smart tips on a wide range of banking and related products or services. This is in line with the HKMA’s long-standing efforts to promote “smart and responsible” use of banking services.
mt_raw: 金管局官方網站（www.hkma.gov.hk）提供超過40,000頁的內容，包括英文、繁體中文及簡體中文，是大眾獲取金管局最新資訊的入口。該網站還包含根據《銀行條例》第20條規定備存的獲授權機構（AIs）及本地代表處名冊，以及AIs證券業務人員名冊，還有根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》備存的儲值支付工具（SVF）持牌人名冊。金管局官方網站在9月進行了重大改版並重新上線，採用了新的設計佈局、豐富了內容、強化了導航結構，並提供了更便捷的搜尋功能。改版後的網站使用戶能夠根據自己的偏好更輕鬆、更方便地搜尋資訊。特別是，改版後的網站新增了「聰明消費者」專區，大眾可以在該專區找到有關銀行及相關產品或服務的實用資訊及聰明技巧。這符合金管局長期以來推廣「聰明及負責任」使用銀行服務的努力。

src_raw: The HKMA Information Centre on the 55th floor of Two International Finance Centre is an important resource introducing the work of the HKMA to the community and promoting public awareness of monetary and banking matters. It consists of an exhibition area and a library, and is open to the public six days a week. The exhibition area describes the HKMA’s work and the development of money and banking in Hong Kong. It also contains reading materials and exhibits for the study of Hong Kong’s monetary, banking and financial affairs.

src_raw: To reach out to the community and raise public awareness of the HKMA’s work, the HKMA organised a public education seminar for over 400 secondary school students and teachers in 2019. Topics covered in the seminar included an introduction to the work of the HKMA, Hong Kong’s banknotes, the FPS, SVFs, fintech and the Deposit Protection Scheme. More than 60,000 teachers and students have participated in this programme since its launch in 1998.

src_raw: The focus of the HKMA’s consumer education initiatives during the year was on educating the public to protect their “personal digital keys”, a concept introduced to help the public visualise the significance of safeguarding information for accessing their online accounts. The central message was that in the digital world, account login details and personal information related to internet banking and other digital financial services were as important as the keys to their home, and should be well protected. Extensive promotion was arranged across different media, including the TV, radio, mobile applications, social media, and other digital and out-of-home platforms, to highlight smart tips on how to protect personal digital keys.
mt_raw: 金管局在該年度的消費者教育舉措重點是教育大眾保護其「個人數位密鑰」，這是一個幫助大眾視覺化保護網路帳戶存取資訊重要性的概念。核心訊息是，在數位世界中，與網路銀行及其他數位金融服務相關的帳戶登入詳情及個人資訊，與家用鑰匙一樣重要，應妥善保護。我們透過電視、電台、行動應用程式、社交媒體及其他數位及戶外平台，進行了廣泛的宣傳，以強調保護個人數位密鑰的聰明技巧。

src_raw: The Financial Secretary (FS) determines the pay and conditions of service for HKMA staff on the advice of the Governance Sub-Committee (GSC) through the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee (EFAC), taking into account the prevailing market rates and practices. Remuneration comprises a total cash package and a provident fund scheme, with minimal benefits in kind. the cash package consists of monthly fixed pay (or basic pay) and variable pay that may be awarded to individual staff members as a lump sum once a year, depending on performance.
mt_raw: 財政司司長根據管治小組委員會（GSC）透過外匯基金諮詢委員會（EFAC）提供的建議，並考慮現行的市場薪酬水平及慣例，決定金管局員工的薪酬及服務條件。薪酬包括總現金薪酬及公積金計畫，並有少量實物福利。現金薪酬包括每月固定薪酬（或基本薪酬）及可變薪酬，可變薪酬可根據表現，以一次性形式每年發放給個別員工。

terms: {'climate risk': '氣候風險', 'hkma': '金管局'}
src_raw: Climate change is one of the major risks threatening the well-being of mankind and the sustainability of the world economy. The financial sector in which banks operate, being an integral part of the society, will also be impacted and hence should be more proactive in managing climate risks. The HKMA is committed to exploring ways to address this challenge. Against this background, the HKMA unveiled in May a number of measures for promoting the development of green finance in Hong Kong, including the adoption of a three-phased approach to promote green and sustainable banking.
mt_raw: 氣候變遷是威脅人類福祉及全球經濟永續性的主要風險之一。銀行營運所在的金融業是社會的重要組成部分，也將受到影響，因此應更積極地管理氣候風險。金管局致力於探索解決這一挑戰的方法。有鑑於此，金管局於五月公布了一系列措施，以促進香港綠色金融的發展，包括採用三階段方法推動綠色與永續銀行業務。

src_raw: The HKMA sees RI as an investment approach that takes into account the impact of various environmental, social and governance (ESG) factors on long-term investment returns and their sustainability. src_raw: The HKMA incorporates ESG factors into its investment analysis processes to identify risks and opportunities, as it believes that these factors can materially affect the long-term value of its investments. Specifically, the HKMA has been integrating ESG factors into its investment process for both public and private market investments. For public market investments, the HKMA incorporates ESG factors in its credit risk analysis of bond investment. External managers that share the HKMA’s RI beliefs are selected and appointed. The HKMA communicates its RI beliefs to all its external managers and expects them to align in such a way that the overall sustainable long-term economic performance target is attainable. For private market investments, the ESG policies and practices of the HKMA’s general partners are examined as part of its due diligence process.
mt_raw: 金管局將ESG因素納入其投資分析流程，以識別風險和機會，因為它認為這些因素會對其投資的長期價值產生重大影響。具體而言，金管局已將ESG因素納入其公共和私人市場投資的投資流程。對於公共市場投資，金管局在債券投資的信用風險分析中納入ESG因素。選聘了與金管局持有相同RI信念的外部經理人。金管局向所有外部經理人傳達其RI信念，並期望他們保持一致，以實現總體永續的長期經濟表現目標。對於私人市場投資，金管局普通合夥人的ESG政策和實踐作為其盡職調查流程的一部分進行審查。

src_raw: To help the visually impaired differentiate between the denomination of the banknotes, a mobile app, sponsored by the HKMA and developed by the Hong Kong Society for the Blind, uses the phone’s camera to scan the banknote patterns for the denomination. The app is available for download from Apple App Store and Google play Store for free. A note-measuring template sponsored by the HKMA and the three note-issuing banks has also been introduced to measure the length of the note. It can measure both the 2018 Series and the notes currently in circulation. The template is embossed with Braille on one side and symbols on the other. It is freely distributed at voluntary agencies serving the visually impaired community.
mt_raw: 為了幫助視障人士區分紙幣面額，由金管局贊助、香港盲人輔導會開發的行動應用程式使用手機相機掃描紙幣圖案以識別面額。該應用程式可從Apple App Store和Google Play Store免費下載。金管局和三家發鈔銀行還推出了一種紙幣測量模板，用於測量紙幣的長度。它可以測量2018系列紙幣和目前流通的紙幣。該模板一面印有盲文，另一面印有符號。它免費發放給為視障人士服務的志願機構。

src_raw: My objectives are to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance, but is not a guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the Audit Commission auditing standards will always detect a material misstatement when it exists. Misstatements can arise from fraud or error and are considered material if, individually or in the aggregate, they could reasonably be expected to influence the economic decisions of users taken on the basis of these financial statements.
mt_raw: 我的目標是取得合理保證，以確定財務報表整體是否不存在因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯報，並發表包含我意見的核數師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但並不能保證按照審計署審計準則進行的審計在存在重大錯報時總能發現該錯報。錯報可能因欺詐或錯誤而產生，如果錯報單獨或合計起來可能影響用戶依據這些財務報表作出的經濟決策，則認為錯報具有重要性。

src_raw: - identify and assess the risks of material misstatement of the financial statements, whether due to fraud or error, design and perform audit procedures responsive to those risks, and obtain audit evidence that is sufficient and appropriate to provide a basis for my opinion. The risk of not detecting a material misstatement resulting from fraud is higher than for one resulting from error, as fraud may involve collusion, forgery, intentional omissions, misrepresentations, or the override of internal control;
mt_raw: - 識別和評估財務報表因欺詐或錯誤而出現重大錯報的風險，設計和執行審計程序以應對這些風險，並獲取充分、適當的審計證據，作為我發表意見的基礎。由於欺詐可能涉及串通、偽造、故意遺漏、虛假陳述或繞過內部控制，未發現因欺詐而導致的重大錯報的風險高於未發現因錯誤而導致的重大錯報的風險；

src_raw: - conclude on the appropriateness of the Monetary Authority’s use of the going concern basis of accounting and, based on the audit evidence obtained, whether a material uncertainty exists related to events or conditions that may cast significant doubt on the Group’s ability to continue as a going concern. If I conclude that a material uncertainty exists, I am required to draw attention in my auditor’s report to the related disclosures in the financial statements or, if such disclosures are inadequate, to modify my opinion. My conclusions are based on the audit evidence obtained up to the date of my auditor’s report. However, future events or conditions may cause the Group to cease to continue as a going concern;
mt_raw: - 就金融管理局採用持續經營會計基礎的適當性作出結論，並根據所獲取的審計證據，確定是否存在與可能對該集團作為持續經營的能力產生重大疑慮的事件或情況相關的重大不確定性。如果我得出結論認為存在重大不確定性，我有責任在核數師報告中提請注意財務報表中的相關披露，或如果披露不充分，則修改我的意見。我的結論是基於截至我發表核數師報告之日所獲取的審計證據。然而，未來的事件或情況可能導致該集團無法繼續作為持續經營。

src_raw: From the matters communicated with the Audit Sub-Committee of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, I determine those matters that were of most significance in the audit of the financial statements of the current period and are therefore the key audit matters. I describe these matters in my auditor’s report unless law or regulation precludes public disclosure about the matter or when, in extremely rare circumstances, I determine that a matter should not be communicated in my report because the adverse consequences of doing so would reasonably be expected to outweigh the public interest benefits of such communication.
mt_raw: 從與外匯基金諮詢委員會審計小組委員會溝通的事項中，我確定了在本期財務報表審計中最為重要的事項，因此這些事項是主要審計事項。我在核數師報告中描述這些事項，除非法律或法規禁止公開披露該事項，或在極為罕見的情況下，我確定不應在報告中溝通該事項，因為這樣做的不利後果將合理地預期超過此類溝通的公共利益。
